'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=85H7sZyJadKZ6XEERWEp1gDpnNz0I7aatqOcH9_u2FY-1773002071-1.0.1.1-jYaIYuGDRLrXKQ9DJ_9T5BLnWh_5V7EsE0XgaIUElbE"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
